message:
feat(server): enforce subscription mode command restriction

When a client has active pub/sub subscriptions, reject all commands
except SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/SSUBSCRIBE/
SUNSUBSCRIBE/PING/RESET/QUIT — matching Redis behavior.

The gate is enforced in fr-server (not fr-runtime) so conformance
tests that use single-session Runtime::execute_frame continue to work.

- Add check_subscription_mode_gate() in fr-server
- Add Runtime::is_in_subscription_mode() public method
- Gate runs before execute_frame in process_buffered_frames

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
